I've reviewed all the files in the Tic-Tac-Toe project. I found the issue in `game.js`:

**Problem on Line 3:**
```javascript
let currentPlayer = 'X';nconst cells = document.querySelectorAll('.cell');
```

There's a stray `'n'` character between the semicolon and `const`, which causes a syntax error. This needs to be fixed to a proper line break.

**Other files look good:**
- `index.html` - Correctly structured with all required elements
- `style.css` - Complete styling with animations and hover
